title: Horde Piggies
description: Pigs reproduce themselves, and gonna take the whole world under their pack!
body:
This mod adds some special pigs which reproduce themselves and evolve into stronger variants, consuming everything on their way.

How they work?
1. Queen pig gets spawned and starts to produce lesser pigs.
2. Lesser pigs will kill surrounding creatures and share resource themselves, especially to queen pigs.
3. When lesser pigs gain certain resource, they will evolve!
4. Also as the queen pigs get many resource, pigs that are made by them will get stronger.
5. When queen pigs enough resource, they will produce a special pig. (For now, there's only a pig golem for it)
6. Queen pigs can order the pigs in their pack to attack their target. (Which means provoking only one queen pig may make the whole horde attacks towards you.)

All pigs are also able to gain resources from killing other mobs, and can be healed when attacked by mobs in same pack.

Also, please note that the color of the pigs are chosen completely randomly, based on their alpha queen's uuid. And they will also attack the pigs that have different pack id between them!

Mobs in the mod currently :

Queen Pig
![Queen pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/139b5db8a0a466f0eefe5140299fdfb19dfdb51f.png)
Main Producer of pigs

A. Lesser Pig

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Lesser Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3942c155db2fb30df067c48ddaad8372b28fff9.png)

#

The most basic and important pig of the pack. They usually gather resources and share them to their pack.

Can evolve into...
1. Queen Pig
2. Big Pog
3. Pig Brute
4. Pavager
5. Hog Pig

</details>

B. Ranged Lesser Pig

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Lesser Ranged Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0ffcdbeb3de972a3a2eb8133b099a599959cc7_0.webp)

#

They shoot a single projectile to their target and share resources if they have.

Can evolve into...
1. Ranged Brute Pig
2. Plama


</details>

C. Pig Brute

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Pig Brute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545b7b1f160be18cf63b2329620f566a6f3d86a6_0.webp)

#

Literally stronger version of lesser pigs.

Can evolve into...
1. Biting Brute Pig

</details>

D. Ranged Pig Brute

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Ranged Brute Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e9e8a79e1d5b82a66a7d140060144acd8eb2b9f_0.webp)

#

Stronger version of lesser ranged pigs. They shoot 3 projectiles at once and get stronger when they gain certain resource.

</details>

E. Pavager

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Pavager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf96150f3316a625614169aad268e69dd36f187_0.webp)

#

Meet pavager again! Well, it's just a speedy & beefy mob. Also get small buff when they get some resources.

</details>

F. Hog Pig

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Hog Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c02e5d2edcffb5f07f91f76a221737118d57dff3_0.webp)

#

They have relatively low health and movement speed, but also have high armor and damage. Slow and tanky.

</details>

G. Plama

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Plama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22c01bbea969ec95741d277bf909d714b004fb5a_0.webp)

#

They shoot a spit that continously generates small projectiles while flying. Also, they get stronger as they collect resources.

</details>

H. Pig Golem

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Pig Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/507fecbb47d0c76ea236010c1f550961d5453f8f_0.webp)

#

They have high hp, damage, and armor. Can only be produced when a queen frog collected lots of resources.

Can evolve into...
1. Pig Stone Golem

</details>

I. Pig Stone Golem

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Pig Stone Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82f3d049fb2130de38c7c33b5a64594601d4e7e_0.webp)

#

Extremely strong mob that can revive 2 times. Also, they have several attacks:
1. Punch
2. Slap
3. Strike
4. Leap
5. Quake

</details>

J. Biting Brute Pig

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Biting Brute Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac25dd55dede1d4fe27d8bccd3fb986c8eef6991_0.webp)

#

They look like just a big brute pig. They use their jaw to eliminate multiple enimies in their radius.

</details>



Big Pog

![Big Pog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc7a31bdb9056ebeb87868db91fdd1179c1d69f7.png)

They look like frogs. Which means they can swim and jump towards the sky. Also when they land on the ground, they will generate multiple spit attacks and cover the area with resources, so kill them as fast as you can.

A. Pog

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Pog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3be6a35b0e16ba1bfe37e70a26f815cd6ed75640.png)

#

Small frog-like pigs. They occationally jump toward sky, and also can swim!

Can evolve into...
1. Pabbit

</details>


B. Pabbit

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

They look like rabbit, but act like just a bit bigger pog. So they are just a strong version of pog in short.

</details>



Here's the planned evolve tree of the pigs :
![Pig Evolve Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c546500d4c5cd4bbfc6b954f735ad46afb772c9d_0.webp)
